heading: Minimum limit modification for noncitizens and aliens
label: 8138 Minimum limit modification for noncitizens and aliens
notes: Historical and Revision NotesDerivationU.S. CodeRevised Statutes andStatutes at Large(a)(4th par., less 2d sentence).5 U.S.C. 793(less 2d sentence), .July 29, 1942, ch. 53356 Stat. 725, , .Sept. 13, 1960Pub. L. 86–767, § 21074 Stat. 910(b)(2d sentence of 2d par.).5 U.S.C. 793(2d sentence of 2d par.), .Sept. 7, 1916, ch. 458, § 4239 Stat. 750“Sec. 42 (2d sentence of 2d par.)”, .Apr. 6, 1938, ch. 7952 Stat. 201In subsection (a), the words “in his discretion” are omitted as unnecessary in view of the permissive nature of the authority. Plan No. 19, (see section 8145).64 Stat. 1271Standard changes are made to conform with the definitions applicable and the style of this title as outlined in the preface to the report.

children.label: a
children.text: Except as provided by subsection (b) of this section, the minimum limit on monthly compensation for disability under and the minimum limit on monthly pay on which death compensation is computed under do not apply in the case of a noncitizen employee, or a class or classes of noncitizen employees, who sustain injury outside the continental United States. The Secretary of Labor may establish a minimum monthly pay on which death compensation is computed in the case of a class or classes of such noncitizen employees.section 8112 of this titlesection 8133 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The President may remove or modify the minimum limit on monthly compensation for disability under and the minimum limit on monthly pay on which death compensation is computed under in the case of an alien employee, or a class or classes of alien employees, of the Canal Zone Government or the Panama Canal Company.section 8112 of this titlesection 8133 of this title
